overall_assessment.fls_score_context: Your 525 FLS score represents solid intermediate performance, with efficient timing (45s) but some precision penalties holding you back from the advanced tier.
overall_assessment.session_headline: Excellent knot technique and timing efficiency with opportunity to refine suture placement precision for score optimization.

rubric_insights.observation: Outstanding 45-second completion time places you in the top efficiency tier
rubric_insights.impact_on_score: Strong time bonus contributing significantly to your 525 score

rubric_insights.observation: Perfect knot sequence execution - proper surgeon's knot with correct hand switching pattern
rubric_insights.impact_on_score: Full points earned for knot technique, no penalties assessed

rubric_insights.observation: Minor deviations of 1.5mm and 1.8mm from target marks resulted in 3.3 penalty points
rubric_insights.impact_on_score: Primary score limitation - addressing placement precision could add 15-20 points

technique_coaching.observation: In frame 10, final suture position shows slight deviation from the marked targets, suggesting either initial needle placement or tissue manipulation could be more precise
technique_coaching.why_it_matters: Precise suture placement is critical for wound closure integrity and directly impacts FLS scoring
technique_coaching.correction: Before needle driving, take an extra 2-3 seconds to align needle entry point exactly with the mark using instrument tips as guides
technique_coaching.drill: Practice 10 needle placements on marked targets without time pressure, aiming for <1mm deviation each time

technique_coaching.observation: In frames 3-4, needle loading and initial positioning appear well-controlled with proper C-shape formation
technique_coaching.why_it_matters: Consistent needle loading sets up accurate placement and prevents tissue trauma
technique_coaching.correction: Maintain this excellent loading technique - grasp point appears optimal at 2/3 from tip
technique_coaching.drill: Reinforce current technique with 15 needle loading repetitions focusing on consistent grasp point

technique_coaching.observation: Frames 6-9 show textbook surgeon's knot execution with proper hand switching - this is exemplary technique
technique_coaching.why_it_matters: Proper knot sequence ensures secure closure and prevents knot slippage
technique_coaching.correction: No correction needed - maintain this excellent sequence
technique_coaching.drill: Continue current knot practice to maintain muscle memory and consistency

strengths_to_reinforce.observation: Your surgeon's knot formation in frames 6-7 is textbook perfect with clear double throw execution
strengths_to_reinforce.why_it_matters: This foundational skill ensures knot security and demonstrates mastery of the core technique
strengths_to_reinforce.encouragement: Your knot tying technique is at an advanced level - this consistency will serve you well in actual surgery

strengths_to_reinforce.observation: The hand switching sequence between throws (frames 7-8) is smooth and efficient without hesitation
strengths_to_reinforce.why_it_matters: Fluid hand switching prevents air knots and maintains proper tension throughout the sequence
strengths_to_reinforce.encouragement: Your instrument coordination shows excellent bilateral dexterity development

practice_plan.session_focus: Precision suture placement while maintaining current speed and knot quality
practice_plan.warmup_drill: 5 minutes of needle loading practice at marked targets without time pressure

primary_drill.name: Precision Placement Challenge
primary_drill.description: Place sutures at marked targets, measuring deviation after each attempt. Focus on needle entry angle and tissue engagement depth. Use instrument tips to verify alignment before driving needle.
primary_drill.success_criteria: 6 out of 8 placements within 1mm of target marks

practice_plan.cooldown: Review your most accurate placement attempt and identify what felt different about your setup and execution
practice_plan.estimated_sessions_to_improvement: 2-3 focused sessions should bring placement precision to <1mm consistently

progress_context.vs_baseline: Significant improvement from early 400s scores to consistent 500+ range
progress_context.vs_peak: Close to your peak performance of 556 - within striking distance of personal best
progress_context.milestone_note: Target: Sub-40s completion with <1mm placement deviation for 550+ FLS score

coaching_limitations: Camera angle limits assessment of needle entry depth and exact tissue engagement quality. Suture tension during knot tying not fully visible from this perspective.
